---
title: "Figures and Tables for Laugier and Stankiewicz JAS"
author: "Elise J. Laugier"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: github_document 
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Setup

Connect to data folder. Enter your path here:

```{r data}
#getwd()
setwd("/Users/jakoby/Dropbox/R/LaugierAndStankiewiczJAS/Laugier-and-Stankiewicz_JAS")
```

Load libraries

```{r libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(viridis)
library(writexl)
```

## Figure 1

```{r Fig1, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, dpi = 500}
df <- read.csv("TableA.1.csv")

# Fig 1 A: RELATIVE Concentrations by Sample ----

# 1) Analyst-level averages (jitter)
dat_avg <- df %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Analyst, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(RelativePer1g = mean(RelativePer1g, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 2) Replicate-combined values (boxplots + stats)
replicate_means <- dat_avg %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(RelativePer1g = mean(RelativePer1g, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 3) Wilcoxon tests per Sample (unpaired)
wilcox_relative_long <- replicate_means %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(
    p_10 = wilcox.test(
      RelativePer1g[Method %in% c("10 CB","10 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("10 CB","10 SPT")], 
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    p_16 = wilcox.test(
      RelativePer1g[Method %in% c("16 CB","16 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("16 CB","16 SPT")], 
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    p_10CB_16SPT = wilcox.test(RelativePer1g[Method %in% c("10 CB","16 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("10 CB","16 SPT")],
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop")

# 4) y-position per facet (max of both datasets)
ymax_by_sample <- bind_rows(
  replicate_means %>% transmute(Sample, y = RelativePer1g),
  dat_avg %>% transmute(Sample, y = RelativePer1g)) %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(ymax = max(y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 5) Annotation table & significance codes
pvals_annot <- wilcox_relative_long %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("p_"), names_to = "comparison", values_to = "p") %>%
  mutate(group1 = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ "10 CB", comparison == "p_16" ~ "16 CB", 
                            comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ "10 CB", TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    group2 = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ "10 SPT", comparison == "p_16" ~ "16 SPT", 
                       comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ "16 SPT", TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    offset = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ 1.08, comparison == "p_16" ~ 1.16, 
                       comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ 1.24,TRUE ~ 1.08),
    sig = case_when(is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_, p < 0.001 ~ "***", p < 0.01  ~ "**", p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns")) %>%
  left_join(ymax_by_sample, by = "Sample") %>%
  mutate(y.position = ymax * offset) %>%
  select(Sample, group1, group2, p, y.position, sig)

# 6) Plot
r_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_boxplot(data = replicate_means, aes(x = Method, y = RelativePer1g),
    linewidth = 0.3, outlier.size = 1.2,) +
  geom_jitter(data = dat_avg, aes(x = Method, y = RelativePer1g, fill = Analyst),
    shape = 21, color = "black", position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0),
    size = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#bf812d", "#2EBBBF")) +
  facet_wrap(~ Sample, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 250000, by = 50000), labels = function(x) x / 1000) +
  labs(title = "Relative Concentrations",
    x = "FOV Count & Mounting Medium",
    y = "Relative # of spherulites\n per g of sediment (1000s)",
    fill = "Analyst") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(pvals_annot, label = "sig", xmin = "group1", xmax = "group2",
    y.position = "y.position", tip.length = 0.01, size = 4)

#r_plot

# Fig 1 B: AREA-CORRECTED Concentrations by Sample ----

# 1) Analyst-level averages (jittered points)
dat_avg <- df %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Analyst, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(MillionsPer1g = mean(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 2) Replicate-combined values (boxplots + stats; ignore Analyst)
replicate_means <- dat_avg %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(MillionsPer1g = mean(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 3) Wilcoxon tests per Sample (unpaired) using replicate-combined values
wilcox_millions_long <- replicate_means %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(
    p_10 = wilcox.test(MillionsPer1g[Method %in% c("10 CB","10 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("10 CB","10 SPT")],
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    p_16 = wilcox.test(MillionsPer1g[Method %in% c("16 CB","16 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("16 CB","16 SPT")],
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    p_10CB_16SPT = wilcox.test(MillionsPer1g[Method %in% c("10 CB","16 SPT")] ~ Method[Method %in% c("10 CB","16 SPT")],
      paired = FALSE)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop")

# 4) y-position per facet (uses the max of both replicate means and analyst points)
ymax_by_sample <- bind_rows(
  replicate_means %>% transmute(Sample, y = MillionsPer1g),
  dat_avg %>% transmute(Sample, y = MillionsPer1g)) %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(ymax = max(y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 5) Annotation table (one row per Sample x comparison) & significance codes
pvals_annot <- wilcox_millions_long %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("p_"), names_to = "comparison", values_to = "p") %>%
  mutate(
    group1 = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ "10 CB", comparison == "p_16" ~ "16 CB",
      comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ "10 CB", TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    group2 = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ "10 SPT", comparison == "p_16" ~ "16 SPT",
      comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ "16 SPT",TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    offset = case_when(comparison == "p_10" ~ 1.08, comparison == "p_16" ~ 1.16,
      comparison == "p_10CB_16SPT" ~ 1.24, TRUE ~ 1.08),
    sig = case_when(is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_, p < 0.001 ~ "***", p < 0.01  ~ "**", p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns")) %>%
  left_join(ymax_by_sample, by = "Sample") %>%
  mutate(y.position = ymax * offset) %>%
  select(Sample, group1, group2, p, y.position, sig)

# 6) Plot
q_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_boxplot(data = replicate_means, aes(x = Method, y = MillionsPer1g),
    linewidth = 0.3, outlier.size = 1.2, ) +
  geom_jitter(data = dat_avg, aes(x = Method, y = MillionsPer1g, fill = Analyst),
    shape = 21, color = "black", position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0),
    size = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#bf812d", "#2EBBBF")) +
  facet_wrap(~ Sample, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Area-Corrected Concentrations",
    x = "FOV Count & Mounting Medium",
    y = "Millions of spherulites\n per g of sediment",
    fill = "Analyst") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(pvals_annot, label = "sig", xmin = "group1", xmax = "group2",
    y.position = "y.position", tip.length = 0.01, size = 4)

#q_plot

# Combine A & B into one using COWPLOT ----
stacked_plot <- plot_grid(r_plot,q_plot, ncol = 1, align = "v", rel_heights = c(1, 1))

stacked_plot
```

## Figure 2
```{r Fig2, fig.width=5, fig.height=4,dpi = 300}

df <- read.csv("TableA.1.csv")

# Average within replicate ----
replicate_means <- df %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(
    MillionsPer1g = mean(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    RelativePer1g = mean(RelativePer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

# Conversion constants ----
y       <- 0.005309
y_sd    <- 0.000804
ratio10 <- 0.006599526 / 0.004124704

# Add converted values ----
replicate_means2 <- replicate_means %>%
  mutate(
    Y_conversion = if_else(Method == "16 CB", (RelativePer1g / y) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Y_conv_low = if_else(Method == "16 CB", (RelativePer1g / (y + y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Y_conv_high = if_else(Method == "16 CB", (RelativePer1g / (y - y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Y_conversion10 = if_else(Method == "10 CB", ((RelativePer1g * ratio10) / y) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Y_conv10_low = if_else(Method == "10 CB", ((RelativePer1g * ratio10) / (y + y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Y_conv10_high = if_else(Method == "10 CB",((RelativePer1g * ratio10) / (y - y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_))

# Factor setup ----
replicate_means3 <- replicate_means2 %>% mutate(Sample = factor(Sample))

sample_levels <- levels(replicate_means3$Sample)

series_levels <- c("16 CB (observed)", "16 SPT (observed)", 
                   "16 CB (converted)", "10 CB (converted)")

set.seed(123)

# 16 CB observed (MillionsPer1g) ----
cb16_rep <- replicate_means3 %>% filter(Method == "16 CB") %>%
  transmute(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = sample_levels), Replicate, 
    mid = MillionsPer1g, Series = factor("16 CB (observed)", levels = series_levels))

cb16_sum <- cb16_rep %>% group_by(Sample, Series) %>%
  summarise(mean_obs = mean(mid, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_obs   = sd(mid, na.rm = TRUE), mid  = mean_obs,
    low  = mean_obs - sd_obs, high = mean_obs + sd_obs,
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  select(Sample, Series, mid, low, high)

# 16 SPT observed ----
spt_rep <- replicate_means3 %>%
  filter(Method == "16 SPT") %>%
  transmute(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = sample_levels), Replicate,
    mid = MillionsPer1g, Series = factor("16 SPT (observed)", levels = series_levels))

spt_sum <- spt_rep %>%
  group_by(Sample, Series) %>%
  summarise(mean_obs = mean(mid, na.rm = TRUE), sd_obs   = sd(mid, na.rm = TRUE),
    mid  = mean_obs, low  = mean_obs - sd_obs, high = mean_obs + sd_obs,
    .groups = "drop") %>% select(Sample, Series, mid, low, high)

# Converted replicate values ----
conv_rep <- replicate_means3 %>%
  transmute(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = sample_levels),
    Replicate,
    mid  = coalesce(Y_conversion, Y_conversion10),
    low  = coalesce(Y_conv_low, Y_conv10_low),
    high = coalesce(Y_conv_high, Y_conv10_high),
    Series = case_when(
      !is.na(Y_conversion)   ~ "16 CB (converted)",
      !is.na(Y_conversion10) ~ "10 CB (converted)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Series)) %>%
  mutate(Series = factor(Series, levels = series_levels))

conv_sum <- conv_rep %>%
  group_by(Sample, Series) %>%
  summarise(mid  = mean(mid), low  = mean(low), high = mean(high),
    .groups = "drop")

# Combine summaries ----
sum_df <- bind_rows(cb16_sum, spt_sum, conv_sum) %>%
  mutate(x_base = as.numeric(Sample),
    x_plot = case_when(
      Series == "16 CB (observed)"  ~ x_base - 0.25,
      Series == "16 SPT (observed)" ~ x_base - 0.08,
      Series == "16 CB (converted)" ~ x_base + 0.08,
      Series == "10 CB (converted)" ~ x_base + 0.25))

# Replicate positions ----
rep_df <- bind_rows(cb16_rep %>% mutate(low = mid, high = mid),
  spt_rep  %>% mutate(low = mid, high = mid),conv_rep) %>%
  mutate(
    x_base = as.numeric(Sample),
    x_dodge = case_when(
      Series == "16 CB (observed)"  ~ -0.25,
      Series == "16 SPT (observed)" ~ -0.08,
      Series == "16 CB (converted)" ~  0.08,
      Series == "10 CB (converted)" ~  0.25),
    x_jitter = runif(n(), -0.04, 0.04),
    x_plot = x_base + x_dodge + x_jitter)

# Plot ----

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = rep_df,
    aes(x = x_plot, y = mid, fill = Series, color = Series),
    shape = 21, size = 1.6, alpha = 0.4, stroke = 0.2) +
  geom_errorbar(data = rep_df %>% filter(Series %in% c("16 CB (converted)", "10 CB (converted)")),
    aes(x = x_plot, y = mid, ymin = low, ymax = high, color = Series),
    width = 0.015, alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_linerange(data = sum_df, aes(x = x_plot, ymin = low, ymax = high, color = Series),
    linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_point(data = sum_df, aes(x = x_plot, y = mid, fill = Series, color = Series),
    shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.75) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq_along(sample_levels), labels = sample_levels) +
  
  scale_color_manual(breaks = series_levels,
    values = c(
      "16 CB (observed)"  = "gray70", "16 SPT (observed)" = "grey30",
      "16 CB (converted)" = "#F05C54", "10 CB (converted)" = "#23A9B0")) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "16 CB (observed)"  = "gray85", "16 SPT (observed)" = "grey70",
      "16 CB (converted)" = "#ed8680", "10 CB (converted)" = "#74d6db"),
    guide = "none") +
  
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Spherulite concentration (millions per g)", color = NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

print(p)
```

## Figure 4

```{r Fig4, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi = 500}

df <- read.csv("TableA.4.csv")
# Reference stats
mu  <- 14.9
sd0 <- 3.0
ymin_ref <- 10.5
ymax_ref <- 18.6

# ---- plot A ----

# viridis palette
pal <- viridis(n = 7, option = "viridis") 

plot_a <- ggplot(df, aes(Hour, MillionsPer1g, color = SampleNo)) +
  
  # --- reference data ---
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = mu - sd0, ymax = mu + sd0,
           alpha = 0.08, fill = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mu, linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.35, color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(ymin_ref, ymax_ref),
             linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.35, color = "grey30") +
  # --- plot data ---
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, na.rm = TRUE, shape = 1, color = "black") +
  # ---  references labels ---
  annotate("text", x = 5.2, y = mu, label = "Mean", hjust = 0, size = 3.3, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.2, y = mu + sd0, label = "+1 SD", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.2, y = mu - sd0, label = "-1 SD", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.2, y = ymax_ref, label = "Max", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.2, y = ymin_ref, label = "Min", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  # ---  axes ---
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(df$Hour)), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(5, 20), breaks = seq(5, 20, by = 5), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.08))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal)+
  labs(x = "Hour", y = "Spherulites Concentration by Sample\n(millions/g of sediment)",
    color = "SampleNo") +
  # ---  theme & Legend ---
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

#plot_a

# ---- plot B ----

# summary stats
df2 <- df %>%
  group_by(Hour) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg = mean(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD   = sd(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = sum(!is.na(MillionsPer1g)))

plot_b <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = Hour, y = Avg)) +
  # --- reference data ---
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = mu - sd0, ymax = mu + sd0,
           alpha = 0.08, fill = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mu, linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.35, color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(ymin_ref, ymax_ref),
             linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.35, color = "grey30") +
  # --- reference labels ---
  annotate("text", x = 5.1, y = mu, label = "Mean", hjust = 0, size = 3.3, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.1, y = mu + sd0, label = "+1 SD", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.1, y = mu - sd0, label = "-1 SD", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.1, y = ymax_ref, label = "Max", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.1, y = ymin_ref, label = "Min", hjust = 0, size = 3.1, color = "grey25") +
  # ---  axes ---
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(df2$Hour)), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(5, 20), breaks = seq(5, 20, by = 5), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.08))) + 
  # --- plot data ---
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Avg - SD, ymax = Avg + SD), width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.6,na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 2.9, shape = 21, fill = "black") +
  # ---  theme & Legend ---
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) + 
  labs(x = "Hour", y = "Average Spherultie Concentration\n(millions/g of sediment)") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

#plot_b

# ---- merge & export plots A & B ----
stacked_plot2 <- plot_grid(plot_b,plot_a, labels = c("A", "B"), ncol = 2, align = "v", rel_heights = c(1, 1))

stacked_plot2
```

## Table A.2

```{r TableA2}

df <- read.csv("TableA.1.csv")

stats <- list(Avg = ~mean(.x), SD  = ~sd(.x),  Min = ~min(.x), Max = ~max(.x))

replicate_means <- df %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(MillionsPer1g = mean(MillionsPer1g),RelativePer1g = mean(RelativePer1g),
    .groups = "drop")

summary_stats <- replicate_means %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method) %>%
  summarise(n_reps = n(),across(c(MillionsPer1g, RelativePer1g), stats, .names = "{fn}_{.col}"),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Range_Millions = Max_MillionsPer1g - Min_MillionsPer1g,
    CV_Millions = 100 * SD_MillionsPer1g / Avg_MillionsPer1g,
    Range_Relative = Max_RelativePer1g - Min_RelativePer1g,
    CV_Relative = 100 * SD_RelativePer1g / Avg_RelativePer1g)

summary_stats_t <- summary_stats %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(Sample, Method), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  unite(SampleMethod, Sample, Method, sep = " | ") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SampleMethod, values_from = Value)

y_by_sample <- summary_stats %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(Y = Avg_RelativePer1g[Method == "16 CB"] / (Avg_MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"] * 1e6),
    .groups = "drop")

y_row <- y_by_sample %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Sample, values_from = Y) %>% mutate(Metric = "Y", .before = 1)

y_summary_rows <- y_by_sample %>%
  summarise(
    `Y Average (all samples)` = mean(Y),
    `Standard Deviation` = sd(Y),
    `Minimum` = min(Y),
    `Maximum` = max(Y),
    `Range` = max(Y) - min(Y),
    `Coefficient of Variation (CV, %)` = 100 * sd(Y) / mean(Y)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Summary")

final_table <- bind_rows(summary_stats_t, y_row, y_summary_rows)
#final_table

write_xlsx(final_table , "TableA.2.xlsx")
```

## Table A.3

```{r TableA3}
replicate_means <- df %>%
  group_by(Sample, Method, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(
    MillionsPer1g = mean(MillionsPer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    RelativePer1g = mean(RelativePer1g, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

# --- Factors ---
y        <- 0.005309
y_sd     <- 0.000804
ratio10  <- 0.006599526 / 0.004124704

replicate_means2 <- replicate_means %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%   # 16 SPT mean/SD computed per sample
  mutate(
    # CB conversions (per row) ----
    Conv_16CB_mean = if_else(Method == "16 CB", (RelativePer1g / y) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Conv_16CB_minus1SD = if_else(Method == "16 CB",(RelativePer1g / (y + y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Conv_16CB_plus1SD = if_else(Method == "16 CB",(RelativePer1g / (y - y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Conv_10CB_mean = if_else(Method == "10 CB", ((RelativePer1g * (ratio10)) / y) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Conv_10CB_minus1SD = if_else(Method == "10 CB", ((RelativePer1g * (ratio10)) / (y + y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    Conv_10CB_plus1SD = if_else(Method == "10 CB", ((RelativePer1g * (ratio10)) / (y - y_sd)) / 1e6, NA_real_),
    
    # 16 SPT range (per Sample): mean ± 1 SD
    # Only populate on rows that have a conversion value
    has_any_conv = !is.na(Conv_16CB_mean) | !is.na(Conv_10CB_mean),
    mean_16SPT = if_else(has_any_conv,
                         mean(MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"], na.rm = TRUE), NA_real_),
    low_16SPT = if_else(has_any_conv,
                        mean(MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"], na.rm = TRUE) -
                          sd(MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"], na.rm = TRUE), NA_real_),
    high_16SPT = if_else(has_any_conv,
                         mean(MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"], na.rm = TRUE) +
                           sd(MillionsPer1g[Method == "16 SPT"], na.rm = TRUE), NA_real_),
    # OVERLAP FLAGS FIRST (TRUE/FALSE)
    overlap_Yconv_vs_16SPT = if_else(
      !is.na(Conv_16CB_minus1SD) & !is.na(Conv_16CB_plus1SD) & !is.na(low_16SPT) & !is.na(high_16SPT),
      !(Conv_16CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT | Conv_16CB_minus1SD > high_16SPT), NA),
    overlap_Yconv10_vs_16SPT = if_else(
      !is.na(Conv_10CB_minus1SD) & !is.na(Conv_10CB_plus1SD) & !is.na(low_16SPT) & !is.na(high_16SPT),
      !(Conv_10CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT | Conv_10CB_minus1SD > high_16SPT), NA),
    # GAP AMOUNT (only if they DO NOT overlap)
    # and whether conversion range is ABOVE or BELOW 16 SPT range
    gap_amt_Yconv_vs_16SPT = if_else(overlap_Yconv_vs_16SPT == FALSE,
                                     case_when(
                                       Conv_16CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT  ~ low_16SPT - Conv_16CB_plus1SD,   # conversion is below SPT
                                       Conv_16CB_minus1SD  > high_16SPT ~ Conv_16CB_minus1SD - high_16SPT,   # conversion is above SPT
                                       TRUE ~ 0), NA_real_),
    gap_dir_Yconv_vs_16SPT = if_else(overlap_Yconv_vs_16SPT == FALSE,
                                     case_when(Conv_16CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT  ~ "below", Conv_16CB_minus1SD  > high_16SPT ~ "above",
                                               TRUE ~ NA_character_), NA_character_),
    gap_amt_Yconv10_vs_16SPT = if_else(overlap_Yconv10_vs_16SPT == FALSE,
                                       case_when(Conv_10CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT  ~ low_16SPT - Conv_10CB_plus1SD,
                                                 Conv_10CB_minus1SD  > high_16SPT ~ Conv_10CB_minus1SD - high_16SPT, TRUE ~ 0), NA_real_),
    gap_dir_Yconv10_vs_16SPT = if_else(overlap_Yconv10_vs_16SPT == FALSE,
                                       case_when(Conv_10CB_plus1SD < low_16SPT  ~ "below",
                                                 Conv_10CB_minus1SD  > high_16SPT ~ "above", TRUE ~ NA_character_),NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-has_any_conv)

replicate_meansA3 <- replicate_means2 %>%
  filter(Method %in% c("10 CB", "16 CB"))

#replicate_meansA3
write_xlsx(replicate_meansA3, "TableA.3.xlsx")
```
